description.value: **Benefit:** While you suffer a physical ailment, such as disease, poison, or ability damage to Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution (but not including hit point damage), you gain a +2 trait bonus on Will saving throws. While you suffer a mental ailment, including insanity, any charm or compulsion effect, or ability damage to Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Fortitude saving throws.
